overview: Buzzy Bites is a restaurant discovery and table reservation platform where diners browse restaurants, explore menus and ambience, and book tables — while restaurant owners manage their listings and reservations through a protected admin dashboard.
features: Restaurant discovery with search and filters by cuisine, neighborhood, and price
Image carousel and gallery showcasing restaurant ambience
Full menu browsing by category (appetizers, mains, desserts, drinks)
Table reservation flow with date picker, time slots, and guest count
Real-time availability display for time slots
Restaurant admin dashboard for managing reservations, menus, and images
Internet Identity login for secure access
Responsive mobile-first design across all devices
